today.subtitle: Full-body barefoot class. HRV 14% below baseline — listen to body, back off max-effort segments.
today.adjustment_label: HRV 14% below baseline — attend class at reduced effort
today.why: HRV 31 ms is 14% below the 7d baseline (36 ms); Garmin status UNBALANCED all week. Class is still appropriate (body battery 39, readiness 69 moderate), but don't push max exertion.

cut_note: *7d TDEE pulled down by today's partial read (800 cal). 6-day complete avg ~2,635 cal → ~1.4 lb/wk is the truer ceiling.
